title: Dot-and-cross diagrams
summary: 9701 AS — drawing outer-shell electron diagrams for ions and molecules.
learningObjectives: Show covalent bonding with shared pairs.

simpleExplanation.title: Electrons in bonding
simpleExplanation.summary: Dot-and-cross diagrams show how outer electrons are arranged in bonding — transferred for ionic, shared for covalent.
steps: Covalent: share pairs to fill shells.

sections.content: **Dot-and-cross diagrams** (3.7) support **3.2–3.4 bonding**. Only **outer shell** electrons unless stated.
